title: EmpaniZambos (Chicken Nuggets) Using Zambos Chile Limón
ingredients: 2 cups of crushed Zambos Chile Limón
instructions: Cut the chicken breasts widthwise into strips
Pass the strips through BBQ sauce until well covered
Crush the Zambos Chile Limón as finely as possible
Cover the chicken pieces with the crushed Zambos
Heat the oil and fry each piece until golden
Serve with BBQ sauce to taste or drizzle with additional sauce
